title: hedeoma drummondii var. crenulata
intro: Hedeoma drummondii var. crenulata, also known as Western Pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a digestive aid and antispasmodic, to relieve symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Western Pennyroyal include its ability to ease muscle spasms, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural insect repellent. Western Pennyroyal is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its benefits.
